case_audits.independence_basis: Fresh checker directly validates the 20-link, reconstructs uncovered four-sets and exact residual pair counts, and compares every CNF clause and auxiliary range.
case_audits.independence_limit: The reconstruction uses the same pinned PySAT sequential-counter implementation; final publication should add a second encoding or independently verified cardinality translation.

equivalence_basis: Each link is directly revalidated by the per-case checker; every uncovered quadruple and all 55 exact residual pair counts are reconstructed clause-for-clause. An independent arithmetic audit shows those pair equalities force exactly 20 residual blocks.
exhaustion_limit: This checker does not prove uniqueness of the ordinary 20-block C(11,5,3) cover. Therefore it certifies 20 exact class instances, not unconditional coverage of all hypothetical 40-covers.
